title: attie's vanilla+
description: Enjoy a comfy RPG-like adventure with hundreds of decorations and a wide range of farming and cooking options.
body:
# 🐝 Attie's Vanilla Plus
Enjoy a comfy RPG-like adventure with hundreds of decorations and a wide range of farming and cooking options.

## ⭐️ Features

This modpack tries to be as vanilla-friendly as possible while keeping unique features to make it exciting!

- Vanilla friendly mechanics and content
- Great ambiance
  - Medieval/Fantasy themed
  - Hundreds of new vanilla-friendly structures and reworks of the existing ones.
  - Built-in Resourcepack: Whimscape
  - Built-in Shaders: Complementary
- Easy multiplayer setup with [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc)
  - It requires no server setup to play online; just open to LAN as normal. A public domain will appear alongside the local port. 
- Solid performance
  - Recommended dedicated RAM: 4GB.

## References
- [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc)
- [The Bumblezone](https://github.com/TelepathicGrunt/Bumblezone/wiki)
